Title: Introduction to the editor role in PowerScribe One
Description: Learn how the PowerScribe One editor role supports the radiology reporting workflow and how to use the Explorer workspace, worklists, and queues to prioritize reports.

Description: This module introduces you to the foundational concepts for creating conversational agents using Microsoft Copilot Studio. It explains how Copilot Studio enables organizations to rapidly design and deploy AI‑powered agents that customers and employees can interact with across various scenarios.

Description: Explore the role of solution architects in designing Power Platform-based solutions, emphasizing understanding its architecture.

Title: Get started with Microsoft Power Platform for app makers
Description: Learn about getting started with Microsoft Power Platform for app makers.

Description: Learn about custom code in custom connectors for Microsoft Power Platform.

Description: Explore data ingestion tasks for purchased electricity and emission data using Microsoft Sustainability Manager connectors in Microsoft for Sustainability.

Title: Import custom visuals and add bookmarks to a report in Power BI - Online workshop
Description: Follow exercises to learn to import custom visuals and add bookmarks to a report.

Description: This module examines the components available for managing and administrating agents.

Description: This module will focus on the available developer tools that can help you perform development activities with Power Platform.

Title: Automate system, workstation, and services actions in Power Automate for desktop

Title: Monitor and manage agents with Microsoft Agent 365
Description: Learn how to monitor using real-time visibility into all agents to detect sprawl, understand usage.

Title: Explore Dynamics 365 Contact Center
Description: Discover how Dynamics 365 Contact Center delivers AI-driven, omnichannel customer service with Copilot, self-service, and workforce optimization.

Title: Secure data access in Power BI
Description: Row-level security (RLS) and Object-level security (OLS) allows you to create a single or a set of reports that targets data for a specific user. In this module, you'll learn how to implement RLS by using either a static or dynamic method and how Microsoft Power BI simplifies testing RLS in Power BI Desktop and Power BI service.

Title: Add intelligence to a real estate solution with AI Builder's GPT prompts
Description: This module introduces the Create text with GPT using a prompt capability in AI Builder.

Title: Create formulas to change behaviors in a Power Apps canvas app
Description: Learn how to enhance and customize your Power Apps canvas app using basic formulas.

Title: Dragon Copilot - nurse leaders essentials
Description: Discover essential skills for nurse leaders to drive Dragon Copilot rollout, from AI concepts to overcoming objections and managing change.

Title: Connect a cloud flow to desktop flows in Power Automate for desktop
Description: Learn how to create cloud flows in Microsoft Power Automate for desktop.

Title: Manage solutions in Power Apps and Power Automate
Description: Learn how to manage solutions in Microsoft Power Apps and Power Automate.

Title: Automate desktop and web tasks with computer use in Copilot Studio
Description: Extend Copilot Studio agents to automate tasks in web browsers and desktop applications using computer use. Configure computer use tools with instructions, machine settings, credentials, and access controls, then monitor execution with the activity map and Dataverse logging.

Title: AutoText in daily reporting
Description: Learn how to use AutoText in PowerScribe One to insert reports, complete fill-in fields, identify noncompliant entries, and ensure accurate, consistent reporting.

Title: Simulate mouse and keyboard actions by using Power Automate for desktop
Description: Learn to automate simulated mouse movement, clicks, typing, and key presses in Power Automate. Also, discover how to select and locate images or areas on the screen.

Description: Learn about Microsoft for Sustainability, which helps organizations build more enduring IT infrastructures by identifying opportunities to replace tools, systems, and activities with more efficient options.

Title: Clean, transform, and load data in Power BI
Description: Use Power Query to clean and prepare data for analysis. Learn to simplify models, change data types, rename objects, pivot data, and profile columns to identify valuable data for deeper analytics.

Title: Integrate agents with external systems via MCP in Microsoft Copilot Studio
Description: Connect your Copilot Studio agent to Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers to access standardized tools and resources. Learn to use the MCP onboarding wizard, configure API key and OAuth 2.0 authentication, manage tool selection, and determine when MCP is the right integration approach compared to connectors or REST APIs.

Description: Learn how to support clinicians by identifying Dragon Copilot problems, guiding resolution, and reinforcing documentation best practices.

Description: The purpose of this module is to provide an in-depth overview of plug-ins as it relates to Microsoft Power Platform development. This module will review how and when plug-ins are implemented, how they're registered and deployed, and the various configuration options that are available during plug-in registration.

Description: Learn about Power Pages administration and explore how Power Pages tools can help you accomplish administrative tasks.

Title: Connect with volunteers using Volunteer Engagement
Description: Explore and manage volunteer opportunities with the Volunteer Engagement module. Update profiles, apply for roles, and track participation in Microsoft for Nonprofits.

Title: Optimize app load time
Description: Learn how you can evaluate and improve app load times. By regularly reviewing and measuring your app, you can proactively identify and remediate startup performance problems.

Title: Get started with AI Builder entity extraction
Description: Explore AI Builder entity extraction, its application in business scenarios, and use in Power Automate.

Title: Turn business ideas into Power Platform solutions with Plans
Description: Use plans in Power Apps to describe a business problem in natural language and let AI agents generate user requirements, a data model, and a technology proposal — then build the complete solution.

Description: Explore how to simplify order updates for Contoso Coffee's suppliers using Power Apps in this extended learning path/workshop.

Description: Set up and navigate the Patient Access portal for easy patient data access and appointment scheduling in Microsoft Cloud for Healthcare.

Description: Extend website functionality by using software development and deploying Power Pages websites with ALM techniques.

Description: Learn how to author a basic formula that uses tables and records in a Power Apps canvas app.

Description: This module takes the learner to the next level in app development by teaching how to customize the app by adding controls, images, and logic.

Description: Track and manage major gifts with a fundraising dashboard. Learn how to view gifts received, manage moves, and generate funding reports in Microsoft Cloud for Nonprofit.

Description: Learn how to install required software.

Description: Learn how to train Dragon Copilot (physicians) enhanced skills, including vocabulary, texts, workflows, prompts, and customizable templates.

Description: Steps of installing the required software on your computer so that you can complete this course.

Description: Learn how to implement integrations in Microsoft Power Platform solutions.

Description: Learn how to use the Data Integration Toolkit and Dataverse Healthcare API to send and retrieve healthcare data in Microsoft Cloud for Healthcare.

Title: Explore Power Automate architecture
Description: Explore the architecture of Microsoft Power Automate.

Title: Automating email handling in Power Automate desktop app
Description: In this module, we'll discuss how to automate email handling in Power Automate desktop app.

Title: Clinical document structuring to FHIR
Description: Learn about clinical document structuring to FHIR in Microsoft Cloud for Healthcare.

Title: Get started with AI Builder prediction
Description: Discover the AI Builder prediction model and its different outcome patterns.

Title: Solution architect series: Model security for Power Platform solutions
Description: Lean about security functionality within Microsoft Dataverse.

Title: Overview of Microsoft for Retail
Description: Gain an overview of the capabilities and solutions offered by Microsoft for Retail.

Title: Active Directory handling in Power Automate for desktop
Description: Learn about the Active Directory actions in Power Automate for desktop.

Title: Database handling in Power Automate desktop app
Description: Learn about the database actions in Power Automate desktop app.

Title: Describe the business value of extending business solutions by using Microsoft Power Platform
Description: This module explores how Microsoft Power Platform and its components address common challenges in productivity, automation, and integration. It examines how tools like Power Automate, Power Apps, and Power BI streamline workflows, automate repetitive tasks, and enable seamless collaboration across Microsoft 365 services. Additionally, discusses Copilot Studio and how it creates custom AI agents. It covers on-premises data gateways for hybrid system integration, and the Plan Designer for building tailored business solutions with minimal technical expertise. PL-900

Title: Plan and manage your Microsoft Power Platform environment
Description: Learn how to manage your Microsoft Power Platform environment

Title: Use AI Builder models in Power Apps
Description: Explore AI Builder's ready-to-use models, enhancing Power Apps user experience and offering interactive controls.

Description: Learn to create tables and establish relationships for building an employee accident tracking model-driven app.

Description: Learn to build flows across multiple data sources.

Description: Review resources for vocabulary, texts, workflows, prompts, and customizable templates to enhance clinical documentation.

Title: Create visual calculations in Power BI Desktop
Description: Visual calculations in Power BI simplify complex formulas by operating directly on visual data. Learn to create visual calculations that enhance analysis without impacting model performance.

Title: Modify DAX filter context in semantic models
Description: Modifying the filter context in DAX lets you control how calculations evaluate data in Power BI semantic models. Gain deeper insights and tailor your analysis in your reports by choosing exactly what data is included in calculations.

Title: Plan your project like a pro
Description: Explore the importance of planning in app development using Power Apps, emphasizing problem identification, and user-focused goals.

Title: Add structured automation to agents in Microsoft Copilot Studio
Description: Learn how to add structured automation to Copilot Studio agents by using workflows as tools at the agent and topic levels.

Title: Dragon Copilot (nurses) learn to train summary
Description: Discover what makes a successful Dragon trainer for nurses, evaluate your readiness, and explore resources to confidently lead training sessions.

Title: Add knowledge sources to an agent - Online workshop
Description: Learn how to add knowledge sources to your Microsoft Copilot Studio.

Title: Solution Architect series: Testing and go-live
Description: The solution architect role is continuous; they must also deploy the solution.

Title: Deliver rich agent responses using Adaptive Cards in Microsoft Copilot Studio
Description: Learn to configure rich agent responses in Microsoft Copilot Studio using message formatting and Adaptive Cards. This module covers message node formatting options, Adaptive Card use cases and configuration, and channel-specific schema considerations for Teams, web, and other surfaces.

Title: Build a Power Apps component
Description: Learn how to build a custom Power Apps component, create a code component solution package, and then test and debug a code component.

Title: Get tips and tricks for teaching PL-900 Microsoft Power-platform Fundamentals
Description: Learn tips and tricks about preparing for your first teaching session, which labs to use, when and how to introduce technical topics, as well as other resources and materials.

Title: Use agent flows in Copilot Studio
Description: Agent flows are a powerful way to automate repetitive tasks and integrate your apps and services. They can be triggered in various ways, such as manually, by other automated events or agents, or based on a schedule. Agent flows are created natively in Copilot Studio and optimized for use in Copilot Studio, to provide a seamless maker experience that simplifies and accelerates agent development. Benefits of agent flows include consistent execution, simple workflow creation, and end-to-end process visibility. You can use cloud flows in Power Automate independently or with agent flows to create end-to-end automation solutions. You can create agent flows by using natural language or a visual designer, allowing for sophisticated automation scenarios. Each agent flow consists of triggers and actions as the two primary elements.

Title: Build a Power Pages website for a real estate solution with Copilot in Power Pages
Description: Learn how to build a Power Pages website for a real estate solution by using Copilot in Power Pages to generate pages, sections, forms, data, and text.

Title: Enhance productivity with Power Automate and the Office 365 Outlook Connector
Description: Emails and calendars are fundamental to modern workplace productivity, and the Office 365 Outlook Connector in Power Automate helps supercharge the way that you manage them. Whether it's sending dynamic emails with attachments, automating meeting requests, or tracking email activity, this connector allows you to streamline and optimize your communication and scheduling tasks. Instead of spending time on repetitive, manual processes, you can create efficient, automated workflows that keep your email and calendar working for you.

Title: Build cross-platform multi-agent solutions using the Agent2Agent protocol in Microsoft Copilot Studio
Description: Learn to integrate cross-platform agents into your Copilot Studio solution using the Agent2Agent (A2A) protocol. Understand when A2A is the right integration choice, configure connections to external A2A-enabled agents with authentication, and validate end-to-end agent delegation.

Title: Manage designations and campaigns in Fundraising and Engagement
Description: Understand how designations allocate funds and the hierarchy of campaigns, appeals, and packages in Microsoft for Nonprofits.

Title: Create a Dataverse table for the machine ordering app - Online workshop
Description: Learn about Microsoft Dataverse tables and columns and how to connect data to a canvas app.

Title: Dragon Copilot (nurses)- How to train and coach basic functionality
Description: Learn how to explain and coach the core Dragon Copilot workflow in Epic Rover so Nursing staff can document consistently.

Title: Home health in Microsoft for Healthcare
Description: Learn to enhance health team collaboration using the Home Health application, allowing for effective patient appointment scheduling in Microsoft for Healthcare.

Title: Healthcare data solutions overview
Description: Learn about healthcare data solutions in Microsoft Fabric.

Title: Write DAX formulas for semantic models
Description: Data Analysis Expressions (DAX) is a formula language for Power BI that enables you to create calculations, add logic, and enhance data analysis within your reports and semantic models.

Title: Scripting in Power Automate desktop app
Description: Explore Power Automate desktop app, enabling automation of complex scenarios using VBScript, JavaScript, PowerShell, and Python.

Title: Build your first workflow with Power Automate and Dataverse for Teams
Description: Bring automation and workflows to Microsoft Teams by using Microsoft Power Automate and Microsoft Dataverse for Teams.

Title: Solution architect series: Model data for Power Platform solutions
Description: Explore the role of solution architects in data modeling for Power Platform, including data types and relationships.

Title: Introduction to Azure Health Data Services
Description: Learn about Azure Health Data Services in Microsoft Cloud for Healthcare.

Title: Use and understand Controls in a canvas app in Power Apps
Description: Controls help create a better experience for the user and collect the appropriate data. This module helps you understand and use Controls.
